sourceSummary.oneLine: Spreadsheet chunk listing chip ceramic capacitor purchase/BOM rows for S4343-W PBA INTERFACE MAIN.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports DHF/DMR component traceability by identifying component part numbers, electrical specifications, approved manufacturer part numbers, suppliers, quantities, currencies, and prices for the detector interface PBA.
keyPoints: Rows repeatedly identify model S4343-W, reference MI99-01326B, and assembly PBA INTERFACE MAIN.
The chunk is dominated by C-CER, CHIP capacitor entries with capacitance, tolerance, voltage, dielectric, package, and tape/reel attributes.

Supplier/manufacturer names include MURATA MANUFACTURING CO., LTD., KOREA MURATA ELECTRONICS CO.,LTD., AVX CORPORATION, SAMSUNG ELECTRO-MECHANICS CO., LTD., SAMWHA CAPACITOR CO., LTD., and TDK CORPORATION.
The spreadsheet contains many repeated rows and spreadsheet error values such as #REF! and #N/A.

entities.name: S4343-W
entities.evidence: Rows begin with S4343-W and end with combined identifiers such as S4343-W2203-000292 and S4343-W2203-005249.

entities.name: MI99-01326B
entities.evidence: Rows repeatedly list MI99-01326B immediately after S4343-W.

entities.name: PBA INTERFACE MAIN
entities.evidence: Rows repeatedly state PBA INTERFACE MAIN and include category fields PC, PBA.

entities.name: MURATA MANUFACTURING CO., LTD.
entities.evidence: Rows for part numbers 2203-000292 and 2203-000491 list MURATA MANUFACTURING CO., LTD.

entities.name: KOREA MURATA ELECTRONICS CO.,LTD.
entities.evidence: Rows for part numbers including 2203-000438, 2203-002285, 2203-005249, and 2203-007503 list KOREA MURATA ELECTRONICS CO.,LTD.

entities.name: AVX CORPORATION
entities.evidence: Rows for part numbers 2203-000425 and 2203-006460 list AVX CORPORATION.

entities.name: SAMSUNG ELECTRO-MECHANICS CO., LTD.
entities.evidence: Rows for part numbers 2203-002398, 2203-007486, and 2203-007561 list SAMSUNG ELECTRO-MECHANICS CO., LTD.

entities.name: SAMWHA CAPACITOR CO., LTD. (CAPACITOR, YONGIN, KOREA)
entities.evidence: Rows for part numbers 2203-000715 and 2203-005565 list SAMWHA CAPACITOR CO., LTD. (CAPACITOR, YONGIN, KOREA).

entities.name: TDK CORPORATION
entities.evidence: Rows for part number 2203-007474 list TDK CORPORATION.

concepts.name: PBA component traceability
concepts.evidence: Each row links S4343-W, MI99-01326B, PBA INTERFACE MAIN, a 2203-series internal part number, component description, manufacturer part numbers, supplier, quantity, currency, and price.

concepts.name: ceramic chip capacitor specifications
concepts.evidence: Rows list C-CER, CHIP descriptions such as 0.01nF,5%,50V,C0G,TP,1608; 10nF,10%,50V,X7R,TP,1005; and 10000nF,20%,16V,X5R,TP,1608(1810).

concepts.name: approved alternate manufacturer part numbers
concepts.evidence: Component rows include multiple manufacturer part numbers, for example GRM1885C1H100J, CS1608C0G100J500NRB, CL10C100JB8NNNC, and C1608COG1H100JT for 2203-000292.

evidence.claim: The chunk covers PBA INTERFACE MAIN component rows for S4343-W under reference MI99-01326B.
evidence.evidenceText: S4343-W,MI99-01326B,PBA INTERFACE MAIN appears repeatedly across the rows.

evidence.claim: The listed components are primarily ceramic chip capacitors.
evidence.evidenceText: Rows contain C-CER,CHIP with capacitor specifications such as 0.01nF, 2.2nF, 10nF, 100nF, 1000nF, and 10000nF.

evidence.claim: Internal part number 2203-000292 is a 0.01nF 5% 50V C0G 1608 ceramic chip capacitor sourced from MURATA MANUFACTURING CO., LTD.
Internal part number 2203-002285 is a 10nF 10% 50V X7R 1005 ceramic chip capacitor sourced from KOREA MURATA ELECTRONICS CO.,LTD.
Internal part number 2203-005249 is a 100nF 10% 50V X7R 1608 ceramic chip capacitor sourced from KOREA MURATA ELECTRONICS CO.,LTD.
evidence.evidenceText: 2203-005249, C-CER,CHIP, 100nF,10%,50V,X7R,TP,1608, GRM188R71H104K, CC0603KRX7R9BB104, CC0603KPX7R9BB104, KOREA MURATA ELECTRONICS CO.,LTD.

evidence.claim: The spreadsheet records purchase quantities and pricing for some components.
evidence.evidenceText: Rows show PC, PBA, quantities such as 10000 or 3000, currencies USD or KRW, and prices such as 0.0012, 0.045, 8.56, and 10.

evidence.claim: The source data contains unresolved spreadsheet references or lookup errors.

reviewFlags.reason: Chunk has no header row, so column meanings are inferred from repeated values and source path context.
Many rows are exact or near duplicates, so repeated evidence should not be counted as independent verification.
No regulatory authority, certificate, test standard, cybersecurity, or submission claim is present in this chunk.
Spreadsheet error values #REF! and #N/A appear in the extracted rows and may indicate broken formulas or incomplete lookup data.
